feed.title: Lumi Studio — independent iOS app guides
feed.subtitle: A six-hour high-intent rotation across every live Lumi Studio app.

entry.title: LockHour Pro — independent iOS app guide

link.title: LockHour Pro on the App Store

entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: LockHour Pro. Block distracting apps and plan focused sessions when Screen Time is not enough. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Focus #DigitalWellbeing #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6780107485
entry.summary: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: LockHour Pro. Block distracting apps and plan focused sessions when Screen Time is not enough. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Focus #DigitalWellbeing #iOSApps App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6780107485

entry.title: G+Money — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: G+Money. Track expenses and convert currencies in a simple offline budgeting flow. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Budgeting #TravelFinance #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755782939
entry.summary: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: G+Money. Track expenses and convert currencies in a simple offline budgeting flow. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Budgeting #TravelFinance #iOSApps App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755782939

entry.title: DailyMate — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: DailyMate. Practice complete phrases for real conversations instead of isolated vocabulary. Read the guide and see if it fits. #LanguageLearning #TravelLanguage #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6790418321
entry.summary: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: DailyMate. Practice complete phrases for real conversations instead of isolated vocabulary. Read the guide and see if it fits. #LanguageLearning #TravelLanguage #iOSApps App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6790418321

entry.title: Cyca — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
Guía de hoy de Lumi Studio: Cyca. Registra ciclos, síntomas y tendencias de forma privada en el iPhone. Consulta la guía para ver si se adapta a ti. #CicloMenstrual #Privacidad #AppsIOS
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6782251621
entry.summary: Guía de hoy de Lumi Studio: Cyca. Registra ciclos, síntomas y tendencias de forma privada en el iPhone. Consulta la guía para ver si se adapta a ti. #CicloMenstrual #Privacidad #AppsIOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6782251621

entry.title: CV Desk — independent iOS app guide

link.title: CV Desk on the App Store

entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: CV Desk. Build ATS-friendly resumes and compare job-description keyword coverage. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Resume #ATS #JobSearch
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6781337213
entry.summary: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: CV Desk. Build ATS-friendly resumes and compare job-description keyword coverage. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Resume #ATS #JobSearch App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6781337213

entry.title: Aim990 — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
本日のLumi Studioアプリガイド：Aim990。30日学習計画、弱点ドリル、進捗管理でTOEIC L&R対策を組み立てる。ガイドで自分に合うか確認できます。 #TOEIC #英語学習 #iPhoneアプリ
App Store：https://apps.apple.com/app/id6784974530
entry.summary: 本日のLumi Studioアプリガイド：Aim990。30日学習計画、弱点ドリル、進捗管理でTOEIC L&R対策を組み立てる。ガイドで自分に合うか確認できます。 #TOEIC #英語学習 #iPhoneアプリ App Store：https://apps.apple.com/app/id6784974530

entry.title: Lumi Bopomofo — independent iOS app guide

link.title: Lumi Bopomofo on the App Store

entry.content:
今日 Lumi Studio App 指南：Lumi Bopomofo。透過遊戲練習注音與拼讀，配合孩子的學習節奏。查看指南，判斷是否適合。 #注音 #幼兒學習 #iOSApp
App Store：https://apps.apple.com/app/id6773017109
entry.summary: 今日 Lumi Studio App 指南：Lumi Bopomofo。透過遊戲練習注音與拼讀，配合孩子的學習節奏。查看指南，判斷是否適合。 #注音 #幼兒學習 #iOSApp App Store：https://apps.apple.com/app/id6773017109

entry.title: Lumi Bopomofo Pro — independent iOS app guide

link.title: Lumi Bopomofo Pro on the App Store

entry.content:
今日 Lumi Studio App 指南：Lumi Bopomofo Pro。用遊戲練習注音符號與拼讀，陪孩子建立熟悉感。查看指南，判斷是否適合。 #注音符號 #親子學習 #iOSApp
App Store：https://apps.apple.com/app/id6775773117
